name: Lemon Cream Cookies - Pjxg05a
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or butter them.
3. Toast almonds in the preheated oven for about 4 minutes or until crisp and lightly colored. Set aside to cool.
4. In a food processor fitted with a steel blade, process almonds until coarsely chopped.
5. Remove zest from lemons using a citrus zester.
6. Process lemon zest and sugar until finely grated, about 1 minute.
7. Add brown sugar, eggs, and cream to the food processor. Process until well mixed, 30-45 seconds.
8. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto prepared cookie sheets, leaving 1 1/2 inches between cookies.
9. Sprinkle each cookie with 2 or 3 toasted slivered almonds on top.
10. Bake in the center of the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Transfer cookies to racks to cool.
12. Store in airtight containers for up to 3 days. Cookies can be frozen for up to 2 months.
